markdown:
I've completed the substantive work. No Lean/blueprint files were edited (correctly — the uncommitted FBC pile is unverified and belongs to the T2 thread; I flagged rather than touched it). Here is my session report.

## Summary
- **Opening Ground, run 0009, focus T2 (`AJC.fbc`, flat base change).** No Horizon has run yet. Set direction, corrected the FBC leaf inventory, and left a build-first recommendation.
- The AJC tree carries a stranded, **never-compiled** FBC pile stacked on the fresh `Type u+1` picrep rewire — already flagged to the human in `I-0075`, which I re-verified and kept current.

## Progress
- **Mapped the true `AJC.fbc` open leaves** (all in `CechHigherDirectImageUnconditional.lean`): `pullback_preservesFiniteLimits` (cleanest, self-contained), plus the `cechComplex_baseChange_iso` trio `cech_pushforward_baseChange_natIso` / `pushPullObj_coverInter_baseChange` (RHS) / `twisted_cech_nerve_iso`.
- **Found roadmap drift:** the `AJC.fbc` summary names `affineBaseChange_pushforward_iso` as the live route, but that + `flatBaseChange_pushforward_isIso` are the abandoned mate route (2 `sorry`, **zero Lean consumers**) — dead code. Logged the correction as a roadmap comment.
- **Verified build state by olean freshness** (no build raced): FBC files STALE/NO-OLEAN, picrep files FRESH. Matches `I-0075`.
- Wrote `recommendation.md`; commented on `AJC.fbc` and `I-0075`; confirmed stale PID `47819` is gone.

## Issues
- **No green build exists** for the AJC tree: `CechHigherDirectImageUnconditional.lean` (stale), `AffinePushPullEssImage.lean` (never built), `IdentityComponent.lean` (never built), root (stale). The FBC half has not compiled since the picrep `Type u+1` bump — could be universe breakage, not just known sorries.
- **Premature `\leanok`:** the uncommitted blueprint diff marks `openImmersion_beckChevalley`/member nodes `\leanok`, but `AffinePushPullEssImage.lean` has never compiled. Left in place (in-flight thread); flagged for the T2 agent to verify on build.
- **Cross-task uncommitted blob risk:** FBC + picrep sit uncommitted together; a naive T2 commit would mislabel the picrep rewire. Commit identity is fixed, so per-thread commits are now possible.
- **No full `lake build` run this session** (multi-hour; out of scope for opening Ground) — build correctness of the pile remains unverified.

## Next
- First Horizon T2 action: **full `lake build` to green the tree** (budget ~hours), then re-inventory sorries.
- Then attack `pullback_preservesFiniteLimits` (recipe in its docstring); the Beck–Chevalley heart leaves are the harder block.
- Prune the dead mate-route lemmas + their `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex` nodes; fix the `AJC.fbc` summary route name.
- Commit FBC and picrep as separate threads once each is green.
recommendation:
# Recommendation for the next Horizon/Ground session (run 0009, focus `tasks=T2` — `AJC.fbc`)

_Opening Ground of run 0009. No prior Horizon diff. Grounded suggestions — self-scope and override if you see better._

- **Build green FIRST, before any new proof work.** The AJC tree carries an uncommitted, **never-compiled** FBC pile stacked on the fresh `Type u+1` picrep rewire. Olean-freshness (`I-0076` method): `CechHigherDirectImageUnconditional.lean` STALE (~2 days), `AffinePushPullEssImage.lean` NO-OLEAN, `IdentityComponent.lean` NO-OLEAN, root STALE; `FGAPicRepresentability`/`RelPicFunctor` are FRESH. So the first job is a full `lake build` — budget hours (`CechSectionIdentificationLegMid1` ≈ 70 min). Do **not** trust the current `sorry`/`\leanok` counts until it compiles.

- **Watch for universe fallout from the picrep bump, not just the known sorries.** `picSharp` was rewired to `Type (u+1)` (`RRelPresheaf`, `HasRationalSection`). The stale FBC files predate that bump, so a red build may be universe/signature breakage rather than genuine leaf work. Green the tree, then re-inventory the sorries.

- **`pullback_preservesFiniteLimits` is the cleanest self-contained leaf** (`CechHigherDirectImageUnconditional.lean:186`): flat `g` ⇒ `g^*` left-exact — the one homology-side gap, no Čech/spectral-sequence entanglement. Its docstring already has the recipe: transfer along `SheafOfModules.pullbackIso`, discharge `forget` + `sheafification` (both preserve finite limits in Mathlib), leaving flat `extendScalars` left-exact via `ModuleCat.preservesFiniteLimits_extendScalars_of_flat`, likely stalkwise. Best target once green.

- **The `cechComplex_baseChange_iso` decomposition is the hard block**, three concrete-tilde leaves: `cech_pushforward_baseChange_natIso` (the multi-hundred-LOC Beck–Chevalley heart), `pushPullObj_coverInter_baseChange` (RHS tilde half; LHS landed via `pushPullObj_pushforward_iso_tilde_affine`), and `twisted_cech_nerve_iso` (naturality residual). All route through the sorry-free `affinePushforwardPullbackBaseChange`. Confirm `AffinePushPullEssImage.lean` actually compiles before leaning on its `openImmersion_beckChevalley`/member-node closures — its blueprint `\leanok` marks in the uncommitted diff are **premature** (the file has never built).

- **Dead code to prune while here:** `affineBaseChange_pushforward_iso` and `flatBaseChange_pushforward_isIso` (`FlatBaseChange.lean`, 2 `sorry`) are the abandoned adjoint-mate route (deleted iter-312) with **zero Lean consumers** (all refs are comments). The `AJC.fbc` roadmap summary still names `affineBaseChange_pushforward_iso` as the live route — it isn't. Prune the lemmas + their `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex` nodes, or mark them superseded; I logged the correction as a roadmap comment on `AJC.fbc`.

- **Commit hygiene (identity is now fixed).** The stranded pile mixes two independent cones — FBC (`Cohomology/**` + `AffinePushPullEssImage.lean`) and picrep (`Picard/{FGAPicRepresentability,RelPicFunctor,IdentityComponent}.lean`). Commit them as **separate** threads once each is green so history isn't a cross-task blob; else a T2 commit will sweep in the picrep rewire mislabeled. See `I-0075` (stranded pile), `I-0073` (rescue-commit recipe), `I-0076` (verify-by-olean, don't race a build).
